name: Flight Price Predictor
description: Predicts flight fares using regression models and serves results via a web interface deployed on Render.

name: Star Feature Predictor
description: Predicts the feature of a star based on its other characteristics using various machine learning algorithms.

name: My Reading Journey
description: A personal library web app that keeps track of books read, currently reading and to-read lists. Users can add, update, and delete book entries.

name: Download Tube
description: A YouTube video and audio downloader built with Flask and yt-dlp. Supports real-time progress tracking and multi-format downloads.

name: AgroCare AI
description: Smart agriculture assistant using ML and DL to provide crop yield, crop recommendations, disease detection, and weather forecasting via a Flask API.
